mnemonics: Pandas Reads Delicious Snacks: Use pandas.read_csv() to easily consume CSV data like a tasty snack.
CSV: Comma Separated Variables - Remember the core structure of the file format.
keyPoints: Use the pandas library with pd.read_csv() for efficient CSV file reading.
Specify the delimiter (e.g., sep=',') for text files that aren't comma-separated.
Handle missing data during import using the na_values parameter to define custom missing value markers.
commonMistakes: Forgetting to import the pandas library (import pandas as pd) before calling read_csv().
Not checking the file path, leading to a FileNotFoundError when the path is incorrect or the file doesn't exist in the specified directory.
